items.description: Vehicle fire on I-95 southbound between Exit 30: COTTMAN AVE/RHAWN ST and 1 miles SOUTH of Exit 30: COTTMAN AVE/RHAWN ST. All lanes closed.
items.formatted: I-95 (Philadelphia County) | Vehicle fire on I-95 southbound between Exit 30: COTTMAN AVE/RHAWN ST and 1 miles SOUTH of Exit 30: COTTMAN AVE/RHAWN ST. All lanes Closed. Estimated Reopen: 4/23/26 - 13:15
